subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install a formula or cask

options.name: --cask
options.description: Treat all named arguments as casks

options.name: --formula
options.description: Treat all named arguments as formulae

options.name: --force
options.description: Install without checking for previously installed versions

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print the verification and post-install steps

options.name: --build-from-source
options.description: Compile from source even if a bottle is available

options.name: --HEAD
options.description: Install the HEAD version from the repository

options.name: --fetch-HEAD
options.description: Fetch the upstream repository to detect if the HEAD version has been updated

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Make some output more quiet

name: uninstall
remove
rm
subcommands.description: Uninstall a formula or cask

options.name: --force
options.description: Delete all installed versions

options.name: --ignore-dependencies
options.description: Do not fail uninstall even if formulae depending on it would become broken

options.name: --cask
options.description: Treat all named arguments as casks

options.name: --formula
options.description: Treat all named arguments as formulae

subcommands.name: upgrade
subcommands.description: Upgrade outdated casks and formulae

options.name: --cask
options.description: Treat all named arguments as casks

options.name: --formula
options.description: Treat all named arguments as formulae

options.name: --force
options.description: Install formulae without checking for previously installed versions

name: -n
--dry-run
options.description: Show what would be upgraded

options.name: --greedy
options.description: Also include casks with auto_updates or version :latest

options.name: --fetch-HEAD
options.description: Fetch the upstream repository to detect if HEAD has been updated

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Fetch the newest version of Homebrew and all formulae

options.name: --merge
options.description: Use git merge instead of git rebase

options.name: --force
options.description: Always do a slower, full update check

name: list
ls
subcommands.description: List all installed formulae and casks

options.name: --formula
options.description: List only formulae

options.name: --cask
options.description: List only casks

options.name: --versions
options.description: Show the version number for installed formulae

options.name: --full-name
options.description: Print formulae with fully-qualified names
Force output to be one entry per line

name: -l
options.description: List formulae and casks in long format

options.name: --pinned
options.description: Show the versions of pinned formulae

subcommands.name: search
subcommands.description: Perform a substring search of cask tokens and formula names

options.name: --formula
options.description: Search only for formulae

options.name: --cask
options.description: Search only for casks

options.name: --desc
options.description: Search for formulae with a description matching text

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: Display brief statistics for your Homebrew installation or a formula

options.name: --json
options.description: Print a JSON representation

options.name: --formula
options.description: Treat arguments as formulae

options.name: --cask
options.description: Treat arguments as casks

options.name: --installed
options.description: Print JSON of all installed formulae

subcommands.name: cleanup
subcommands.description: Remove stale lock files and outdated packages

name: -n
--dry-run
options.description: Show what would be removed

options.name: -s
options.description: Scrub the cache, including downloads for even the latest versions

options.name: --prune
options.description: Remove all cache files older than specified days

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Check your system for potential problems

subcommands.name: services
subcommands.description: Manage background services with macOS launchctl

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.description: Start the service for the formula

subcommands.name: stop
subcommands.description: Stop the service for the formula

subcommands.name: restart
subcommands.description: Stop and start the service for the formula

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List all managed services for the current user

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run the service for the formula without registering to launch at login

subcommands.name: cleanup
subcommands.description: Remove all unused services

subcommands.name: tap
subcommands.description: Tap a formula repository

subcommands.name: untap
subcommands.description: Remove a tapped formula repository

subcommands.name: pin
subcommands.description: Pin the specified formula, preventing them from being upgraded

subcommands.name: unpin
subcommands.description: Unpin the specified formula, allowing them to be upgraded

subcommands.name: link
subcommands.description: Symlink all installed files for the formula into the Homebrew prefix

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Delete files that already exist in the prefix

options.name: --force
options.description: Allow keg-only formulae to be linked

name: -n
--dry-run
options.description: List files that would be linked or deleted

subcommands.name: unlink
subcommands.description: Remove symlinks for the formula from the Homebrew prefix

name: -n
--dry-run
options.description: List files that would be unlinked

subcommands.name: deps
subcommands.description: Show dependencies for a given formula

options.name: --tree
options.description: Show dependencies as a tree

options.name: --installed
options.description: List dependencies for all installed formulae
Only show dependencies one level down

subcommands.name: leaves
subcommands.description: List installed formulae that are not dependencies of another installed formula

subcommands.name: outdated
subcommands.description: List installed casks and formulae that have an updated version available

options.name: --formula
options.description: Only list outdated formulae

options.name: --cask
options.description: Only list outdated casks

options.name: --json
options.description: Print output in JSON format

options.name: --greedy
options.description: Also include casks with auto_updates or version :latest

subcommands.name: reinstall
subcommands.description: Uninstall and then reinstall a formula or cask
